positive: Stylized minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest scene, featuring bioluminescent glowing mushrooms, intertwined vines, and a central fox figurine sitting among floating glowing geometric shapes. The style is a blend of Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e) and modern vector art, using strong black outlines and limited, vibrant color palette: deep forest emerald, sapphire blue, glowing cyan, and burnt orange accents. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centrally focused, designed for maximum visual impact on clothing. High contrast, clean silhouettes, flat graphic aesthetic. Crisp linework, solid color blocks, digital illustration, print-ready.
negative: blurry, grainy, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, multiple heads, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, smudge, messy, realistic photo, photorealistic, 3d render, oil painting
